title: Senior Business Development Manager at Brigade Group Ventures Solutions

jsonLd.title: Senior Business Development Manager at Brigade Group Ventures Solutions
jsonLd.description:
We at Brigade Group Ventures Solutions are looking for an experienced Business Development Manager based out of Varanasi. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Brigade Group Ventures Solutions:
Brigade Group Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Contract Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Brigade Group Ventures Solutions!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
